projectDescription: A CLAUDE.md file and Claude Code plugin providing four behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding pitfalls, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations.
keyFeatures: Think Before Coding — surface assumptions and tradeoffs before writing code
Simplicity First — minimum code that solves the problem, nothing speculative
Surgical Changes — touch only what you must, match existing style
Goal-Driven Execution — define verifiable success criteria and loop until met
Claude Code plugin installation via marketplace
publicApiSurface: /plugin marketplace add forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills — Claude Code plugin install
